name: eager-l3-progress-badge
description: Move 3 (eager-L3 Phase 3, 2026-05-27) — asserts the EagerExtractionProgressBadge becomes visible during an active sweep. Seeds provider + enables `compute.rag.eager-l3` persona, triggers `Reload` to retrigger GRAPH_LOAD, waits 5s for the sweep to populate the BehaviorExtractor queue, then reads `__canaryGetProgressBadgeState()` and asserts visible=true with inFlight+queueDepth > 0. Pixel-diff checkpoint freezes the union of the bottom-right L3 progress badge + the green top-center PASS badge so a regression in either (badge styling, hook contract, sweep-not-firing) shows up. Wait window deliberately small (~10s end-to-end) — we're verifying the badge surfaces during an active sweep, not waiting for completion.

commands: (() => { localStorage.setItem('qualia.landingShown', 'true'); localStorage.setItem('qualia.extraction.provider', JSON.stringify({ id: 'ollama', config: { baseUrl: 'http://localhost:11434', model: 'gemma4:e4b' } })); return 'seeded'; })()

(() => { const r = window.__canarySetPersonaEnabled('compute.rag.eager-l3', true); if (!r || r.ok !== true) throw new Error('failed to enable compute.rag.eager-l3 persona: ' + JSON.stringify(r)); return 'persona on'; })()

actions.command: (() => { const r = window.__canaryGetProgressBadgeState(); if (!r || r.ok !== true) throw new Error('hook envelope not ok: ' + JSON.stringify(r)); const s = r.value; if (!s.visible) throw new Error('progress badge not visible during active sweep — got ' + JSON.stringify(s)); const total = (s.inFlight || 0) + (s.queueDepth || 0); if (total === 0) throw new Error('badge visible but inFlight+queueDepth === 0 (idle); got ' + JSON.stringify(s)); return 'badge active: ' + JSON.stringify(s); })()

(() => { const b = document.createElement('div'); b.id = 'canary-eager-l3-badge'; b.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:8px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#2a7;color:#fff;padding:6px 14px;font-family:monospace;z-index:99999;font-size:14px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:bold;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);'; b.textContent = 'PASS progress badge visible during sweep'; document.body.appendChild(b); return true; })()
